creator: iserikov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Max Brazhnikov from comment #7)
Thank you!
Although, MAINTAINER= still points to my ACM address that I am going to loose this month as I explained in https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-bugs/2020-March/093270.html. The problem is neither FreeBSD nor GitHub offer an email alias to use a public email. Of course, anybody can always reach the developer of any GitHub project through the website but this is not an email that you can use elsewhere.
